groups.title: Scene Backgrounds
groups.summary: All-sky visual backgrounds used in non-AR scene modes.

items.name: Milky Way background
items.credit: NASA/Goddard Space Flight Center Scientific Visualization Studio; Gaia DR2: ESA/Gaia/DPAC; visualization by Ernie Wright.
items.licenseNote: Tone-mapped locally from the NASA SVS OpenEXR source. Credit NASA/Goddard SVS and Gaia DR2: ESA/Gaia/DPAC; do not imply NASA endorsement.

items.name: Milky Way mini preview background
items.credit: NASA/Goddard Space Flight Center Scientific Visualization Studio; Gaia DR2: ESA/Gaia/DPAC; visualization by Ernie Wright.
items.licenseNote: Downscaled from Luna's tone-mapped NASA SVS OpenEXR conversion for compact preview scenes. Credit NASA/Goddard SVS and Gaia DR2: ESA/Gaia/DPAC; do not imply NASA endorsement.

groups.title: Planet And Moon Textures
groups.summary: Compact texture maps for educational visualization, not scientific analysis.

items.name: Mercury texture
items.credit: NASA/Johns Hopkins University Applied Physics Laboratory MESSENGER complete mono basemap.
items.licenseNote: Public domain NASA mission imagery; credit NASA and avoid implying endorsement.
